headline: Inflation jumps as tech faces new pressure points
summary: U.S. inflation posted its biggest monthly increase in nearly four years after war-driven gasoline and diesel prices surged, putting fresh pressure on consumers and Washington. In tech, a suspect was detained after an alleged Molotov attack on Sam Altman’s home and threats at OpenAI, while Anthropic’s new Mythos model is drawing cybersecurity concerns and Apple’s foldable iPhone has reportedly moved into a new pre-production testing stage.
why_it_matters: The morning’s mix of hotter prices, AI security worries, and major platform shifts points to fresh volatility for households, policymakers, and the tech industry.
stories_used: Record gas price surge fuels sharp rise in U.S. inflation - Honolulu Star-Advertiser
Sam Altman’s Home Attacked With Molotov Cocktail, Suspect Taken Into Custody - WSJ
What smart people are saying about Mythos, Anthropic's new AI model that has some cybersecurity experts spooked - Business Insider
The Latest Foldable iPhone Rumors: What's Changed and What We Know Now - MacRumors
